description: API_GATEWAY specification requires exclusive modification access
DATABASE migration requires exclusive schema change access
Three-layer dependency chain: DB schema -> Backend API -> Frontend UI
BACKEND_DEV cannot finalize API until schema is ready
FRONTEND_DEV cannot integrate until API is ready
REVIEWER must approve each layer's code before proceeding
BACKEND_DEV discovers schema is insufficient, triggering additional migration by DB_ADMIN
REVIEWER requests API changes that alter the spec, requiring FRONTEND_DEV notification
Integration tests pass or fail; failure triggers cascading updates through dependency chain
DB migration -> BACKEND_DEV implementation -> FRONTEND_DEV integration -> testing (layered pipeline)
Cascading re-work: schema change invalidates BACKEND_DEV code, which invalidates FRONTEND_DEV, creating a chain of dependent re-work that could stall progress
